source_status: Verified directly or verified for paper usage
tamu_use_case: Use readable CFD-side material branch rather than one hidden generic salt default
known_failure_mode: A hidden generic salt branch recreates the June 2 mismatch
notes: Keep Jin, Kirst, and validation branches explicit.

model_form: Laminar fully developed circular-pipe Darcy friction f_D = 64 / Re
tamu_use_case: Baseline distributed friction in smooth straight sections
known_failure_mode: Assuming this alone closes redevelopment or local losses overstates support

model_form: Shah apparent-friction framework for hydrodynamic entry
tamu_use_case: Comparison or sensitivity closure for reset or short redeveloping sections
required_inputs: section length; hydraulic diameter; Re; reset assumption
known_failure_mode: Treating it as a loop-wide default conflates redevelopment with distributed friction
notes: Use only when a reset assumption is stated.

model_form: Explicit local-loss terms for contractions expansions elbows reducers and fittings
source_status: Verified directly with unresolved exact values
tamu_use_case: Separate geometric losses from distributed friction
known_failure_mode: Hiding local losses inside effective friction obscures physical attribution
notes: Keep K placeholders source-tagged until exact tables are audited.

model_form: Feature-resolved retained-time effective K from full-path hydro closure
tamu_use_case: Future feature closure once retained-time path integrals exist
required_inputs: retained-time full-path p_rgh and hydro integrals
known_failure_mode: Current artifact stack preserves only proxy endpoint evidence
notes: Do not promote feature K_eff into defended v1.

model_form: Branch-aware direct Salt Nu fit log(Nu) = a + b log(Re)
tamu_use_case: Optional direct thermal closure on the strongest direct branch
required_inputs: local Re; local k; hydraulic diameter
known_failure_mode: Using this outside its defended branch/domain overclaims support

model_form: Support-gated UA' profile or segment-average library
tamu_use_case: Primary thermal state surface for the first defended 1D model
required_inputs: branch thermal summaries or segment libraries
known_failure_mode: Unsupported branches and low delta-T regions remain outside this safe subset
notes: Preferred over HTC because it avoids extra wall-area normalization.

model_form: Support-gated effective HTC profile or segment-average library
tamu_use_case: Secondary thermal surface for diagnostics and cross-checks
required_inputs: branch thermal summaries or segment libraries
known_failure_mode: Promoting it to the primary surface adds avoidable normalization noise
notes: Carry beside UA' rather than instead of UA'.

model_form: Fully developed laminar circular limits Nu = 3.657 or Nu = 4.364
tamu_use_case: Reference surfaces for comparison and lower-order checks
known_failure_mode: Treating these as default truth for every current section ignores thermal development

model_form: Muzychka and Yovanovich combined-entry Nusselt framework
source_status: Verified model class with implementation conversion pending
tamu_use_case: Higher-fidelity entry sensitivity or future branch closure
required_inputs: Pr; entry coordinate; characteristic-length conversion; boundary condition type
known_failure_mode: Characteristic-length conversion and branchwise support are not yet hardened in this repo
notes: Do not implement silently without documenting length conversion.

tamu_use_case: Flag whether a section is plausibly thermally developed
required_inputs: Re; Pr; characteristic length; axial length
known_failure_mode: A diagnostic is not itself a closure law
notes: Use to justify or refuse development assumptions.

model_form: Mixed-convection buoyancy flag such as Ri = Gr / Re^2
tamu_use_case: Flag segments where buoyancy likely alters forced-convection assumptions
required_inputs: local properties; delta T; diameter; velocity scale
known_failure_mode: Using this as an automatic closure switch would overstate what the repo supports
notes: Use as a gate before promoting new Nu laws.

tamu_use_case: Primary cooling-side forcing contract for defended v1
required_inputs: fixed sink Q from readable case BCs
known_failure_mode: A literal cooler-h control is not visible in the readable artifacts
notes: Do not mutate hidden cooler h in defended v1.

tamu_use_case: Absorb unresolved feature and return-path hydraulic losses in v1
required_inputs: per-case residual calibration from CFD totals
known_failure_mode: Treating the residual as defended physics would hide missing closure structure
notes: Use one clear residual bucket until feature-path closure exists.

tamu_use_case: Absorb unsupported wall-loss and cooler-vicinity thermal behavior in v1
required_inputs: heater cooling and ambient-loss balance from CFD package outputs
known_failure_mode: Folding unsupported external losses into internal Nu would distort interpretation
notes: Keep it explicit until wider direct thermal support exists.
